title: Berry tweaks
description: Adds a couple of recipes with sweet berries!
body:
**Adds a couple of recipes with sweet berries!**


<details>
<summary>Berry syrup bottle</summary>

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7435bfcf032ec35f40819ae74cce424ef4555374.png)

![Berry syrup bottle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fb26287190e554ce6ae915ddfa7bcc2516e248f.png)

For the most part, berry syrup bottle is a copy of honey bottle:

Drinking one restores 6 hunger and 1.2 hunger saturation and returns a glass bottle. Can be drunk even with a full hunger bar. Drinking a berry syrup bottle takes 25% longer than eating other food - 2 seconds - and has a honey bottle sound. Stackable up to 16.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Biscuit</summary>

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcafaa1ab00b63483715d2eb62e2cfabc48e342d.png)

Now you can make biscuits from berries!
</details>

<details>
<summary>Cake</summary>

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9a81006791e76d3227352b505971a7b99f40a96.png)

You can see berries on the cake, so why aren't they in the recipe? And the recipe is rebalanced.
</details>
